system.description:
Roll +Mind when you take time to closely examine something and figure out what's going on.

10+: Ask two questions.

7-9: Ask one: Are there any traps? Is there remaining magic here? Anything strange physically? Similar to something I've seen before? Anything of use here?

results.partial: Ask one: Are there any traps? Is there remaining magic here? Anything strange physically? Similar to something I've seen before? Anything of use here?
